_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: There was a marked decrease in the number of cells positively labeled for Ki67 in the MLN8237-tissue...There was an increase in cyclinB1 in the nucleus and cytoplasm...the population of xenograft tumor cells with multiple nuclei was significantly increased
details: Marked decrease in Ki67-positive cells and increase in cyclinB1 in nucleus and cytoplasm, with significantly increased population of xenograft tumor cells with multiple nuclei at 4 or 16 hours after last dose.
